response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level fullstack engineer with 15+ years of experience, vastly overqualified for a junior/mid-level entry-level role. Technical skills strongly align (TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent work, AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), but the seniority mismatch creates significant risk of retention issues, compensation misalignment, and dissatisfaction with entry-level responsibilities. Berlin location fits the on-site requirement, and German is only basic which may matter for a German construction/energy context.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS infrastructure experience well beyond requirements
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
AI/LLM and MCP exposure aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for entry-level role
Likely compensation expectations far above junior/mid budget
Only basic German for a German-market renovation/energy platform
